configurations.name: webapi
runtimeArgs: from embrapa_dashboard.webapi.app import app; app.run(host='127.0.0.1', port=8000, threaded=True)

configurations.name: webapi-prod-data
configurations.comment: LOCAL-ONLY: run_preview_local.py is git-ignored (serves the built SPA against PROD BigQuery; not for CI). Create it yourself — see the 'Local preview w/ PROD data' recipe — or use the 'webapi' config, which works out of the box.
